description_long: This is a single low-top casual sneaker, primarily constructed from a combination of blue and gray fabric and synthetic materials. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with dark eyelets and matching laces, and the upper shows visible signs of wear, including scuff marks and faded areas, especially around the toe and heel. The side panels are stitched with contrasting seams, and a small circular accent is present on the outer side. The sole is thin, flat, and light-colored, with a slightly worn appearance, suggesting frequent use. The interior lining appears to be a lighter blue fabric, and the overall silhouette is streamlined and narrow. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A worn blue and gray low-top sneaker with criss-cross laces, visible scuffing, and a flat, light-colored sole. The shoe has a streamlined shape and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue and gray color contrast, stitching details, and the streamlined profile of the shoe.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the criss-cross lacing, rounded toe, and visible scuff marks on the toe cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the circular accent, stitching, and the worn condition of the upper and sole.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel area, interior lining, and the back seam, with visible wear on the heel.
